introduction:
Kalope Tech appreciates the opportunity to collaborate with Demo Academy on the development of a comprehensive Learning Management System (LMS). This document outlines our proposal to deliver a robust platform tailored to the educational needs of your institution.

The LMS will support video lessons, quizzes, progress tracking, certificates, and payment processing, catering to three distinct user roles: students, instructors, and administrators. Our goal is to enhance the learning experience and streamline the educational management process.
executive_summary: Kalope Tech will deliver a fully functional Learning Management System that empowers Demo Academy to provide engaging educational content and track student progress effectively, ultimately driving higher student satisfaction and improved learning outcomes.

screens.name: Login Screen
screens.description: User login interface for students and instructors.

screens.name: Create Course
screens.description: Interface for instructors to create courses.

screens.name: Course Catalog
screens.description: List of available courses for students.

screens.name: Video Lessons
screens.description: Interface for students to view video lessons.

screens.name: Quizzes
screens.description: Functionality for students to take quizzes.

screens.name: Progress Tracking
screens.description: Dashboard for students to track their progress.

screens.name: Generate Certificate
screens.description: Functionality to create certificates for completed courses.

screens.name: View Certificates
screens.description: Interface for students to view earned certificates.

screens.name: Reports
screens.description: Generate reports on course performance and user engagement.

timeline.description: Designing user interfaces and user experience flow.
Conducting thorough testing of all features.
Deploying the LMS on the production server.
Providing training for users and ongoing support.

total_duration_note: Post-launch maintenance & support to be agreed separately.

project_cost.description: This price covers complete design, development, testing, and deployment. Post-launch maintenance will be scoped separately.

deliverables: User manuals for students and instructors

terms_and_conditions.label: Scope Changes
terms_and_conditions.text: Any additions or modifications to the agreed scope will be treated as change requests and quoted separately.

terms_and_conditions.label: Intellectual Property
terms_and_conditions.text: Full ownership of the codebase and all assets is transferred to the client upon receipt of final payment.

terms_and_conditions.label: Confidentiality
terms_and_conditions.text: All information related to this project will be kept confidential.

terms_and_conditions.label: Timeline
terms_and_conditions.text: Timelines are estimates and may be adjusted based on project evolution.

terms_and_conditions.label: Warranty
terms_and_conditions.text: A warranty period of 6 months will be provided for bug fixes.

closing_message: Thank you for your trust. We look forward to building something great together.
